subject: [PATCH v3 3/4] testing: add nfsd-io-bench NFS server benchmark suite

reviews.author: Ritesh Harjani (IBM)
reviews.summary: Suggested moving the benchmark scripts to xfstests, citing its existing performance testing framework.

2026-04-26.patch_summary: The patch adds an NFS server benchmark suite, but its long-term value and maintainability are questioned.
